name: Source-Lifted Flow Matching for Intervenable Multimodal Imitation

description: arXiv:2607.10206v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Flow-matching policies are promising for imitation learning because they model complex multimodal action distributions. However, their stochasticity is largely passive: repeated sampling may yield diverse behaviors, but users cannot directly choose among valid continuations from the same state. We propose Source-Lifted Flow Matching (SL-FM), a s...
author: He Zhang, Ying Sun, Pengteng Li, Ziyang Chen, Yiren Zhao, Ziyang Rao, Weiyu Guo, Yandong Guo, Hui Xiong
